ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT LUPE LOUGHLIN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND REFER THE MATTER FOR BINDING ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 14, 2015 AT 9;30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE ALL PARTIES A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. ALL PARTIES SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THEIR FILINGS WITH DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN (302/EHG)

DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.
ORDER RE: LUPE LOUGHLIN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LUPE LOUGHLIN'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SET FORTH A STATUTORY BASIS FOR SETTING ASIDE THE JUDGMENT. THE JUDGMENT IS NOT VOID, AS THE COURT HAD BOTH PERSONAL AND SUBJECT MATTER JURISDICTION OVER THE MATTER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kurtiss A. Jacobs, of Hunt & Henriques, Tel. 408.677.5858, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
Lupe Loughlin, in pro per, Tel. 415.640.3734, for defendant.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT LUPE LOUGHLIN's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant has not set forth a statutory basis for setting aside the judgment. The judgment is not void, as the Court had both personal and subject matter jurisdiction over the matter. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Continued To Jul-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT LUPE LOUGHLIN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND REFER THE MATTER FOR BINDING ARBITRATION is continued to July 14, 2015, at 9;30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give all parties a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. All parties shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of their filings with department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2014 Set For Trial On Apr-06-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
